M1.name: CPS Engineering Capability
M1.description: Ability to design, analyze and integrate complex systems combining software, hardware and environmental elements

M2.name: Research & Innovation Capability
M2.description: Ability to conduct independent research including problem modeling, method selection, result analysis and knowledge output

M3.name: Engineering Practice & Professional Capability
M3.description: Ability to undertake engineering tasks in real industrial environments, understand quality standards and implement projects

M4.name: Communication, Language & Cross-cultural Collaboration
M4.description: Ability to communicate effectively in multilingual professional environments and collaborate in cross-cultural teams

BC1.name: Data Analysis & System Behavior Understanding
BC1.description: Identify and analyze data for observing phenomena and system behavior

BC2.name: System Integration & Interdisciplinary Knowledge
BC2.description: Integrate knowledge related to systems (interdisciplinarity and systems approach)

BC3.name: System Modeling & Problem Solving
BC3.description: Construct and solve general system problems through modeling

BC4.name: Multi-constraint System Optimization
BC4.description: Optimize mechatronic systems under multiple constraints

BC5.name: Cross-system Interface Mastery
BC5.description: Master processes at the interface of systems of different natures

BC6.name: Innovation & High-level Exchange
BC6.description: Bring innovative contributions in high-level exchanges and complex contexts

BC7.name: Research Responsibility & Academic Contribution
BC7.description: Take responsibility for contributing to professional knowledge and practices

BC8.name: Social, Environmental & Economic Integration
BC8.description: Integrate social, environmental and economic issues into technical choices

BC9.name: Project Management
BC9.description: Conduct a project including planning, budgeting, time management and design

BC10.name: Critical Thinking & Knowledge Awareness
BC10.description: Develop critical awareness of knowledge in a field and at interfaces

BC11.name: Societal & Environmental Responsibility
BC11.description: Act with societal and environmental responsibility
